description: PRD-005 — Módulo social: sistema de amizades, feed, posts e interações

userStories.title: Criar migrations para tabelas sociais
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables for friendships, posts, likes, and comments.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration for friendships table: id (uuid PK), requester_id (foreign uuid to users), addressee_id (foreign uuid to users), status (enum: pending|accepted|blocked), accepted_at, blocked_at, created_at, updated_at. Unique index on (requester_id, addressee_id)

Create migration for posts table: id (uuid PK), user_id (foreign uuid), type (enum: text|achievement|goal_completed|workout_completed|level_up), content (text nullable), metadata (json nullable), visibility (enum: public|friends_only), created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
Create migration for post_likes: id (uuid PK), post_id (foreign uuid), user_id (foreign uuid), created_at. Unique on (post_id, user_id)
Create migration for post_comments: id (uuid PK), post_id (foreign uuid), user_id (foreign uuid), content (text), created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

userStories.title: Criar models sociais
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Eloquent models for all social tables.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Friendship model with UUID, scopes for pending/accepted/blocked
Create Post model with UUID, soft deletes, hasMany likes/comments
Create PostComment model with UUID, soft deletes
Add friends and posts relationships to User model

userStories.title: Implementar sistema de amizades
userStories.description: As a user, I want to send, accept, reject friend requests and manage friends.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /v1/friends — list accepted friends with pagination

userStories.title: Implementar busca de usuários
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search for other users to add as friends.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /v1/users/search?q=term — search by name or username (LIKE query)
Return: id, username, name, avatar_url, is_friend, friendship_status

userStories.title: Implementar criação e listagem de posts/feed
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create posts and see a feed of friends' posts.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /v1/posts — create text post (max 500 chars, body: { content, visibility })
GET /v1/feed — posts from friends + own, ordered by created_at DESC, cursor pagination
GET /v1/posts/{id} — single post with comments and like count
DELETE /v1/posts/{id} — soft delete own post only
Include like_count, comment_count, is_liked_by_me in responses

userStories.title: Implementar likes e comentários em posts
userStories.description: As a user, I want to like and comment on friends' posts.

userStories.title: Atualizar leaderboard de amigos com dados reais
userStories.description: As a user, I want the friends leaderboard to use real friendship data.
acceptanceCriteria: Update LeaderboardController@friends to query accepted friends
Rank by XP from user_gamification table
Same response format as other leaderboard endpoints
userStories.notes: Depends on friendship system from US-003.
